info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-10-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Get all campaigns, with optional filtering.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_campaigns_beta.json)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15.pre/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`id`: `any`
`name`: `contains`
`archived`: `equals`
`builder`: `equals`
`created_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`updated_at`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-10-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Create a campaign with inline audiences, messages, and variations.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/create_campaign_beta.json)

requestBody.description: Create an omnicampaign with inline audiences, messages, and variations.

parameters.name: id

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-10-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Returns campaign messages based on filters.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_campaign_messages_beta.json)

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15.pre/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`id`: `any`, `equals`
`campaign_id`: `equals`
`name`: `contains`
`status`: `equals`
`created`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`
`updated`: `greater-or-equal`, `greater-than`, `less-or-equal`, `less-than`

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and will be released in GA in our 2026-10-15 revision. > > A beta revision header (2026-07-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Clones an existing campaign, returning a new campaign based on the original with a new ID and name.

Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `campaigns:write` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/clone_campaign_beta.json)

id.description: Target campaign for the cloned audience. Defaults to the source audience's campaign.

included.description: The list of included group IDs

excluded.description: The list of excluded group IDs

temporary_id.description: Client-supplied temporary ID. Messages reference this value via audience_temporary_id to establish the audience-message relationship.

included.description: The list of included group IDs

excluded.description: The list of excluded group IDs

created.description: The datetime when this audience was created

updated.description: The datetime when this audience was last updated

id.description: The campaign ID to be cloned

name.description: Name for the cloned campaign. Defaults to 'Copy of {source name}'.

definition.description: The campaign definition containing audiences and optional messages

messages.description: Messages to create on this campaign. Each references an audience via audience_temporary_id.

audiences.description: Audiences to create on this campaign. Each references a message via audience_temporary_id.

id.description: The audiences associated with the campaign
The messages associated with the campaign
The tags associated with the campaign

archived.description: Whether the campaign has been archived

color.description: Campaign display color as a hex string (e.g. 'ff5733')

description.description: A short description of the campaign

send_time.description: The datetime at which the message should be sent (must be in the future). Required when strategy is not 'smart_send_time'.

send_date.description: The date on which the message should be sent. Required when strategy is 'smart_send_time'. Must not be in the past.

strategy.description: The send strategy to use: static, local_timezone, throttled, or smart_send_time

throttled_options.description: Required when strategy is 'throttled'. Configuration for throttled sending.

timezone_options.description: Optional when strategy is 'local_timezone'. Configuration for timezone-based sending.

id.description: The campaign ID to be updated

created_at.description: The datetime when the campaign was created

updated_at.description: The datetime when the campaign was last updated

id.description: The audiences associated with the campaign
The messages associated with the campaign
The tags associated with the campaign
The composite ID of the translation in format {resource_type}::{qualifier}::{collection_id}

tracking_options.description: The tracking options for this message

send_options.description: The send options for this message

audience_temporary_id.description: Must match a temporary_id in the definition.audiences array.

is_add_utm.description: Whether to add UTM parameters to links in this message

throttling_type.description: Smart sending throttling configuration for this message

variations.description: Inline variations for this message. Default variation created if omitted.

created.description: The datetime when this message was created

updated.description: The datetime when this message was updated

id.description: The content variations for this message

send_time.description: The UTC send time for this message

send_times.description: Per-variation send times, keyed by variation ID. Populated for send-time optimization and AB send time test strategies.

send_strategy.description: The scheduling strategy for this message.

recipient_percentage.description: The percentage of recipients to send this message to

created.description: The datetime when this audience was created

updated.description: The datetime when this audience was last updated

id.description: The ID of the scheduled campaign message

send_time.description: The datetime at which the message is scheduled to send. Null for smart_send_time strategy.

send_date.description: The date on which the message is scheduled to send (present for smart_send_time strategy)

strategy.description: The send strategy used for scheduling

throttling_percentage.description: Percentage of recipients sent to per throttle unit. Present when strategy is 'throttled'.

throttle_unit.description: The time unit each batch of recipients is sent over. Present when strategy is 'throttled'.

created_at.description: The datetime when the campaign was created

updated_at.description: The datetime when the campaign was last updated

The messages associated with the campaign
The tags associated with the campaign

created.description: The datetime when this message was created

updated.description: The datetime when this message was updated

id.description: The content variations for this message

created.description: The datetime when this variation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this variation was updated

id.description: The associated static image for mobile push variations

action_type.description: The action type for a push notification action button.

badge_config.description: A push message variation's badge config.

push_type.description: A push message variation's push type.

text_message_type.description:
A sms message variation's text message type.

Values match the Django OmniSMSTextMessageType (MESSAGE_FORMAT_*)
    constants.

exit_condition_enabled.description: Whether exit conditions are enabled for this campaign

exit_condition_conversion_metric_id.description: The conversion metric ID used for exit conditions

throttling_percentage.description: Percentage of recipients to send to per throttle unit (10, 11, 13, 14, 17, 20, 25, 33, or 50)

throttle_unit.description: The time unit each batch of recipients is sent over: 'hour' or 'minute'.

send_past_timezones_tomorrow.description: If true, recipients in timezones where the send time has already passed will receive the message the following day. If false, they receive it immediately.

id.description: The composite ID of the translation in format {resource_type}::{qualifier}::{collection_id}

source_locale.description: The source locale for this translation

target_locales.description: The target locales for this translation

fallback_locale.description: The fallback locale for this translation

created.description: The datetime when this translation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this translation was updated

details.description: The channel-specific content details for this variation

created.description: The datetime when this variation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this variation was updated

id.description: The associated static image for mobile push variations

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-07-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
